sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Auto-Doubles
special_mechanics.description: Automated combo sequences triggered by specific button press sequences; core combat mechanic

special_mechanics.name: Combo Breaker
special_mechanics.description: Defensive move allowing player to interrupt opponent's combo at auto-double or linker stage; grants temporary enhanced special moves

special_mechanics.name: Double Health Bar
special_mechanics.description: Each player has two health bars; match ends when first player depletes both bars; no health recovery between bar depletions

special_mechanics.name: Ultra Combo
special_mechanics.description: Finishing move allowing character to deliver extended hit string (typically 20+ hits, sometimes reaching 80+) as combo finisher

special_mechanics.name: No Mercy/Danger Move
special_mechanics.description: Graphic finishing moves; at least two per character

special_mechanics.name: Humiliation
special_mechanics.description: Alternative finisher forcing opponent to dance

tier_notes: Tier 1 classification based on empirical/qualitative data. Available sources document gameplay mechanics and design features but contain no quantified movement physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision data). Fighting game with emphasis on automated combos and defensive breaker mechanics rather than platforming physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Killer Instinct (SNES)
